title: scan_tip as i64 cast in TxRecord violates project convention
description: payment.rs inserts TxRecord with block_height: scan_tip as i64. Project convention (bd memory DESIGN-sqlite-amount-cast) requires i64::try_from(u64) with a descriptive Err for all u64→i64 casts going to SQLite. The as-cast silently truncates if scan_tip > i64::MAX (impossible in practice but a violation of the established pattern). Fix: i64::try_from(scan_tip).map_err(SendPaymentError::Db)?
